reference: Hello Doctor, I am from Kathmandu, Nepal. I have pain and burning in my anorectal region. This has been happening for two years. Recently, I underwent a sigmoidoscopy which found an anal papilla. I have already taken Ayurvedic and homeopathic medicine, but my problems have not gone away. What should I do? Please help me solve my problem.
text: Hello doctor, I am from Kathmandu, Nepal. I have pain and burning in my anal rectal region; this has been happening for 2 years. Recently I underwent a sigmoidoscopy which— Anal papilla. I have taken Ayurvedic and homeopathic medicine, but my problems have not gone away. What should I do? Please help me solve my problem.
